name: team-dashboard-marketing
description: Read the team's funnel library, caption styles, inspiration board and daily briefs, generate voice clips in the team voices, and hand draft posts to Mark for approval.

api_key.title: Dashboard access key
api_key.description: Paste the access key Mark gave you (it starts with pcp_board_). It is stored securely in your computer's keychain.

server_url.title: Dashboard server address
server_url.description: Leave this as-is unless Mark tells you otherwise.
